response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform with 5–10 years of professional experience. While they have C/C++ background, their recent work heavily focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with no evidence of recent or substantial C++ development in capital markets or fixed-income systems. Domain expertise in financial services is also missing.
strengths: Strong software development fundamentals with experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD and modern development practices
Demonstrated passion for software craftsmanship and knowledge sharing through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: Insufficient recent C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No visible experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems
Lack of domain expertise in financial services or fixed-income derivatives
